{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ohowimatano Shrine
| native_name = 大井俣神社
| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ohowimatano Shrine'''|大井俣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].
